sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28989" key="dusergasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεργ-ᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">difficulty of performing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
